title: 1 step DFU - Update All button triggers DFU for earbuds and charge case
scenario: "Update All" button shows a single unified DFU progress bar for both earbuds and charging case instead of separate progress indicators
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (earbuds + charging case)
Ensure a firmware update is available for both earbuds and the charging case
expected: A single unified progress bar is displayed, progressing from 0% to 99%, representing the simultaneous DFU process for both earbuds and the charging case.
